assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Response explicitly shows upgrading control plane first in Phase 1 before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response provides coordinating→data→master upgrade order with clear rationale that coordinating nodes are lowest risk and masters are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Regional pd-ssd volumes will persist through node replacements' in key safety measures

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention PodDisruptionBudget (PDB) configuration for master nodes to maintain quorum

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly shows maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 settings for both data and master node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple cluster health checks and provides monitoring script, plus shows waiting for green status before master upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Response does not include kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets, only node and pod status commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed Elasticsearch snapshot creation commands in the pre-upgrade preparation section
